answers: Web: Portfolio, Blog. Python: Chatbot, Scraper. Mobile: Todo app. AI: Image classifier.
Great project ideas: AI chatbot, web scraper, expense tracker app, image classifier, or a full-stack portfolio website.
Final year projects that impress: ML-based disease predictor, real-time chat app, e-commerce site, or an NLP sentiment analyser.
Build projects that solve real problems. Ideas: attendance system with face recognition, budget tracker app, or a news aggregator using APIs.
